description: The Local Screen Point To Direction node takes in a normalized screen space (``0`` to ``1`` along the user's screen in the X and Y position), and converts it to a direction in world space. This node just takes where you are looking and points it in the direction outward from your camera/screen.

fields.NormalizedScreenPoint: The screen point from the user's perspective.
fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): Returns the direction from this point.
